violations.description: Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not accurate or not easily readable. Thermometer in the walk-in cooler was found broken. Thermometers should be in working condition.--Temperature measuring device was not provided. Thermometer was not available in the reach-in cooler. Thermometers should be available in all refrigerated units.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The ice deflector panels in the ice machines were found dirty during inspection. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Outside surfaces of equipment throughout the kitchen were found dirty. Inside of the microwave and reach-in cooler were also found dirty. Equipment should be cleaned and maintained clean..--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Filters for the hood ventilation system were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Utensils were found stored in a dirty drawer under the microwave. Clean equipment should be stored in a clean location.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Portion and drink cups and lids were found on the floor of the back storage area. These should be stored off of the floor.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Flooring under equipment was found dirty. Flooring should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. Sour cream in the walk-in cooler was found at 60F. Potentially hazardous foods should be maintained at 41F or below. **Sour cream should be discarded.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Scoops used for dispensing ice were found stored on top of dirty ice dispensers. Scoops should be stored in a clean location between uses.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food prepared and packaged by a processing plant was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days after original package was opened. Expired cartons of scrambled eggs were found in the walk-in cooler. Expired food items should not be used in licensed food establishments. **These should be discarded.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Can opener blade and ice machine back splashes were found dirty during inspection. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Outer surfaces of kitchen equipment were found dirty. Inside of the microwave, reach-in cooler and refrigerated drawers were also found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single-use 16 oz cups and portion cups and lids were found stored on the floor of the storage area. Single use items should be stored off of the floor.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
